scope: Narrow structural cleanup of duplicate scripts-only gate redaction helpers.

changed_files.change: Added shared redact_preserving_schema helper for gate artifact redaction.
Replaced duplicate private gate redaction helper with shared import alias.
Replaced duplicate private gate redaction helper with shared import alias.
Replaced duplicate private gate redaction helper with shared import alias.
Added focused unit test for recursive gate payload redaction.
Added canonical P4.6.4 structural cleanup report.

extracted_helpers_notes: No core runtime helper was extracted in P4.6.4. State merge, report validation, risk/RAG scoring, and long-running script functions remain registered for later review.

merged_helpers.compatibility: Gate scripts keep _redact_preserving_schema import aliases, so call sites and output behavior remain stable.

boundary_improvements.details: Gate-only redaction logic now lives under scripts/gate_utils.py; app does not import scripts.
No FastAPI dependency found in app/rules; risk rule semantics were not changed.
RAG evidence boundary remains read-only for chief_complaint, duration, risk_status, and risk_rule_ids.
Memory code remains state/summary focused and does not freely call an LLM.
Workflow adapter continues to orchestrate boundaries without changing business rule semantics.

tests_added_or_updated.purpose: Verify recursive redaction across dict keys, nested lists, tuples, numeric keys, and serialized output.

risky_items_not_touched: TurnOutput, RunState, and FinalReport fields and semantics
SQLite tables, columns, and schema metadata
Risk rule IDs, keyword semantics, and sticky high-risk behavior
RAG evidence boundary and core state fields
legacy MVP/stateful scripts, gate scripts, SFT scripts, and RAG compatibility modules
user-visible Chinese literals and existing encoding/mojibake candidates

remaining_complexity_candidates.reason_not_touched: Core state merge behavior; splitting requires dedicated regression coverage.
Large evaluation script path; leave for a scripts-only cleanup phase.
RAG scoring behavior; avoid changing retrieval ranking in this phase.
Legacy RAG scoring compatibility; avoid semantic drift.
API contract gate logic; defer to compatibility planning.
Long-session reliability path; needs dedicated regression scope.

unchanged_contracts: FastAPI API contract and response body semantics
SQLite schema and historical session compatibility
known_cautions: Broad ruff formatting was not applied.
High-complexity core functions were recorded but not split.
P4 gate may still emit the existing Transformers/PyTorch version warning.
The shared helper intentionally preserves prior tuple-to-list JSON-compatible behavior.

next_recommended_phase.name: P4.6.5 Deprecation & Compatibility Plan
items: Inventory legacy, gate, SFT, and RAG compatibility entrypoints.
Mark keep/deprecate candidates without deleting or moving them.
Require human approval before any future removal.
